parameters.filterByFormula: AND({Doc Type} = 'TCC', {Status} != 'archived', IS_BEFORE({Expiry Date}, DATEADD(TODAY(), 31, 'days')), IS_AFTER({Expiry Date}, DATEADD(TODAY(), -1, 'days')))

parameters.subject: {{ $json.urgency === 'URGENT' ? '⚠ URGENT: ' : '' }}Your Tax Clearance Certificate expires in {{ $json.daysUntilExpiry }} days
parameters.message:
Hi {{ $json['Client Name'] }},

Your Tax Clearance Certificate (TCC) expires on {{ $json['Expiry Date'] }} — that is {{ $json.daysUntilExpiry }} days from today.

{{ $json.urgency === 'URGENT' ? 'This is urgent. Please contact us immediately so we can prepare your renewal file.' : 'We are preparing your TCC readiness file now. Please ensure all your filings are current (VAT, NIB, business licence) as these affect TCC issuance.' }}

A TCC is required for:
- Government contracts and tenders
- Collecting payment from government or public bodies
- Certain ownership transfers and licences

We will be in touch shortly with a checklist of what is needed. If you have any questions, reply to this email.

Current Bahamas
hello@currentbahamas.com

parameters.subject: {{ $json.urgency }}: TCC expiry in {{ $json.daysUntilExpiry }} days — {{ $json['Client Name'] }}

fields.Name: ={{ $json['Client Name'] + ' — TCC Renewal ' + new Date().getFullYear() }}
fields.Notes: ={{ 'Auto-created by CB-TCC-REMIND. TCC expires ' + $json['Expiry Date'] + ' (' + $json.daysUntilExpiry + ' days). Urgency: ' + $json.urgency }}
